description_long: This is a square, plush pillow with a slightly dimpled and textured surface, featuring a subtle speckled pattern in shades of beige and brown. The pillow appears well-stuffed, giving it a full, voluminous shape with gently rounded corners and a soft, inviting appearance. The fabric has a matte finish, with a tactile quality that suggests a woven or microfiber material. There are no visible seams, tags, or embellishments, giving the pillow a minimalist and modern look. The coloration is consistent across all sides, with darker speckles concentrated toward the edges and corners. Its size and design make it suitable for use on sofas, chairs, or as decorative support in urban living spaces.
description: A square, plush pillow with a beige and brown speckled pattern and a soft, matte finish. It has a full, inviting shape and a minimalist, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pillow's square shape, full volume, and the even distribution of the speckled pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the pillow's thickness and the way the fabric is pulled taut at the edges, with the seam visible along the side.
description_view_2: Bottom view reveals the pillow's broad base and the subtle curvature of its surface, with the speckled pattern more concentrated at the edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the pillow's thickness and the seam along the side.
